upgrades.changelog:
- SDK with fixed dead node issue
- Fixed soft reset from input toggles
- Fixed sw2 detached mode parameter default -> 1 (active)
- Removed parameters 36/39
- Removed meter cc
- Removed power notifications
- Removed parameters no. 91, 92, 93, 94
- Removed Inclusion/exclusion" indication (2x ON/OFF output)
- Changed energy reporting to two decimal points
- other minor improvements
